name: North West (South Africa)

description: A field charged centrally with the coat of arms of the North West Province.
history: North West is one of the nine provinces of South Africa, created in 1994 from the western Transvaal and the homeland of Bophuthatswana. Its provincial flag (bearing the provincial coat of arms) has been used by the provincial administration but is not formally registered with the South African Bureau of Heraldry.

features.role: Coat of arms of North West Province
